reason: Verified browser-use feature allows agent to open browser, navigate to URL, extract page title, and report it back with correct information
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Gamut interface showing agent list
Clicked on "QA-20260706-235426-d8j2" agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded with chat interface showing agent settings and controls
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in textbox — Message appeared in input field (ref=e172)
Clicked Send message button — Message was sent successfully and agent status changed to "working"
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed work in 12 seconds and returned response
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot — Response clearly states "The page title is \"Example Domain\"" and shows agent successfully:
